titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Peter Salovey, President of Yale University, Records IMPORT 2018-09-11T10:46:25-04:00
Salovey (Peter), President of Yale University, Records IMPORT 2018-09-11T10:46:25-04:00
titlestmt.author: compiled by Michael Lotstein

conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Describing Archives: A Content Standard

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 12, 2018 at 00:30

did.unittitle: Peter Salovey, president of Yale University, records IMPORT 2018-09-11T10:46:25-04:00
did.abstract: The records consist of subject files, correspondence, annual reports, and memoranda documenting Peter Salovey's activities as president of Yale University. The records contain substantive documentation on virtually every aspect of the university administration, schools, departments, and other major units.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 2-A (YRG 2-A), Records of the Yale president's office.

accessrestrict.head: Information about Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the collection is restricted until the end of Peter Salovey's tenure as president of Yale University

prefercite.head: Cite As
prefercite.p: Peter Salovey, President of Yale University, Records (RU 1157). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Description of the Collection
scopecontent.p: The records consist of subject files, correspondence, annual reports, and memoranda documenting Peter Salovey's activities as president of Yale University. The records contain substantive documentation on virtually every aspect of the university administration, schools, departments, and other major units.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.
